prompt: Review order_service.ts for code quality issues and suggest improvements.
assertions: Output includes a Verdict line (REQUEST CHANGES | COMMENT ONLY | NEEDS SCOPE | NO MAJOR FINDINGS)
Each finding includes Location, Evidence, Why it matters, Recommended remediation, and Confidence
